title: Quantus Med - Multimodal Clinical AI
tagline: Fusing medical imagery with real-time physician voice dictation for automated SOAP reports
problem: Physicians face massive documentation overhead, often spending more time on reports than on actual patient diagnosis.
solution: Developed a zero-knowledge clinical AI using Llama-3 Vision and Whisper-large-v3 to generate structured SOAP reports in under 500ms.

results.description: Designed for strict healthcare data privacy

architecture.security: Zero-Knowledge Encryption + PII Masking at Edge

decisions.rationale: Ensured no patient-identifiable data leaves the local environment, meeting strict HIPAA guidelines.
